user_query: What kind of recipe did Evan request from Sam on 19 August, 2023?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Evan")]/Session[atom(content =~ "recipe request")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "recipe") and atom(content =~ "Sam") and atom(content =~ "19 August 2023")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Evan")]/Session[atom(content =~ "recipe request")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "recipe") and atom(content =~ "Sam") and atom(content =~ "19 August 2023")]
